summary.executive_summary:
A security assessment was conducted on the target application.
The assessment identified 7 vulnerabilities across the tested endpoints.

Risk Summary:
- Critical: 6
- High: 0
- Medium: 1
- Low: 0

Overall Risk Level: Critical

Immediate attention is required to address critical and high severity findings.

rejected_findings.title: Server-Side Template Injection
rejected_findings.description: User input is unsafely embedded into server-side templates, allowing template code execution.
rejected_findings.poc_evidence: SSTI confirmed: {{7*7}} = 49 | Template expression evaluated: 7*7=49 | [PROOF] expression_evaluated: Template expression 7*7=49 evaluated | [CONTROLS] NEGATIVE CONTROL FAILED: 4/4 controls show same behavior as attack (benign, benign, empty, no_param) | [CONFIDENCE] 30/100 [rejected]
rejected_findings.impact: Often leads to remote code execution. Attacker can read files, execute commands, and compromise the server.
rejected_findings.remediation:
1. Never pass user input to template engines
2. Use logic-less templates when possible
3. Implement sandbox environments for templates
4. Validate and sanitize all template inputs
rejected_findings.ai_rejection_reason: Rejected ssti in id: negative controls show same behavior (4/4 controls match) (score: 30/100)
